publicV1.reason: Adds a deployment-gated, owner-required, separately scoped, secret-free provisioning-attempt and cleanup diagnostic read for one task without widening the ordinary Task response.

mcp.reason: Adds the matching gated MCP diagnostic tool over the same canonical contract, required-owner policy, tasks:diagnostics scope, and direct canonical JSON compatibility text.

openapi.reason: The new scoped diagnostics path, pagination input, strict safe event union, and response examples derive from the canonical public registry and contracts.

apiPlayground.reason: The Playground derives the diagnostics operation and renders only the canonical secret-free response from the shared registry.

internalOnly.reason: Adds versioned provider-neutral diagnostic emission across AIO, cloud-http, and BoxLite; bounded persistence and coverage; BoxLite settlement and fallback-cleanup evidence; primary-versus-cleanup preservation; provisioning metrics; and a session-only owner/live-admin Console view.
